## 🚀 Welcome to the Mesa Examples Gallery!
Thank you for sharing your model! To keep our gallery running smoothly, please complete this quick checklist. 

### ✅ The Checklist
- [ ] **Dependency Isolation:** I have included a `requirements.txt` inside my model's specific folder.
- [ ] **Run Instructions:** I have included a `README.md` explaining exactly how to run it.
- [ ] **Visual Proof:** I have attached a screenshot or GIF of the model running below.

### 📸 Screenshot / GIF
*(Drag and drop your image here!)*

### 📝 Brief Description
*(What does this model do? What Mesa features does it highlight?)*
